tests_dropped_with_escalation.name: test_imports_lang_flag_on_extensionless_file
tests_dropped_with_escalation.reason: Brief asserted direct-compute on extensionless files honors --lang. Empirically false: get_imports() calls parse_file() which re-detects language from extension only (parser.rs:L263-L271), ignoring caller-supplied Language. Fixing this requires touching crates/tldr-core/, which is a M3 STOP condition. Escalated as a follow-up.

escalation.blocker: crates/tldr-core/src/ast/parser.rs ParserPool::parse_file ignores language hints (extension-only language detection)
escalation.scope: follow-up issue — out of M3 scope per STOP condition #2 (must touch crates/tldr-core/)
escalation.suggested_fix: thread Option<TldrLanguage> hint into ParserPool::parse_file, OR have tldr-core/src/ast/imports.rs::get_imports use parse_with_path() + read bytes directly, NOT parse_file()
